---
title: "Tutorials"
subtitle: "Task-focused guides for fMRI modeling workflows."
---

Start with the design-matrix tutorial, then move to the API reference for
specific functions and classes.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [Build a design matrix](design-matrices.qmd)
Create condition-specific HRF regressors from an event table and inspect the
resulting column metadata.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### [API reference](../reference/index.qmd)
Look up the main event, HRF, contrast, GLM, and single-trial APIs generated
from Python docstrings.
:::
:::

:::
